<mxfile host="65bd71144e"> <diagram name="communication-system" id="comm-system-diagram"> <mxGraphModel dx="1100" dy="900" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/>
<!-- Main components --> <mxCell id="j1" value="Jetson Orin Nano Super" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="30" width="240" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" value="SH-C31G #1 (can1)
電気的絶縁" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="150" width="200" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" value="SH-C31G #2 (can2)
電気的絶縁" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="150" width="200" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="imu" value="WitMotion WT901C
IMU (RS232)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="370" y="150" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gp" value="Logitech F710r
ゲームパッド" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="570" y="150" width="170" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mb" value="MacBook
(開発・可視化)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="310" width="160" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Left leg motors --> <mxCell id="l1" value="left_hip_yaw (ID:11)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="280" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" value="left_hip_roll (ID:12)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="330" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" value="left_hip_pitch (ID:13)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="380" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l4" value="left_knee_pitch (ID:14)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="430" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l5" value="left_ankle_pitch (ID:15)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="480" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Right leg motors --> <mxCell id="r1" value="right_hip_yaw (ID:21)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="280" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" value="right_hip_roll (ID:22)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="330" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" value="right_hip_pitch (ID:23)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="380" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4" value="right_knee_pitch (ID:24)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="430" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r5" value="right_ankle_pitch (ID:25)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="480" width="200" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Termination resistors --> <mxCell id="lt" value="120 ohm 終端抵抗
(XT30(2+2))" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="95" y="540" width="130" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rt" value="120 ohm 終端抵抗
(XT30(2+2))" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="815" y="540" width="130" height="40" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Annotation texts --> <mxCell id="a1" value="120 ohm (内蔵)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="85" y="220" width="150" height="20" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" value="120 ohm (内蔵)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#d6b656;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="805" y="220" width="150" height="20" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" value="CAN 1Mbps (can1) — 左脚" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#666666;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="248" width="200" height="20" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a4" value="CAN 1Mbps (can2) — 右脚" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#666666;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="248" width="200" height="20" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a5" value="X=前方, Y=左, Z=上" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#82b366;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="385" y="210" width="150" height="20" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Edges: Jetson connections --> <mxCell id="e1" value="USB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="j1" target="s1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="USB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="j1" target="s2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="USB (RS232)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="j1" target="imu" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="USB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="j1" target="gp" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" value="WiFi / Ethernet
(ROS 2 DDS)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="j1" target="mb" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- CAN bus edges: left leg --> <mxCell id="cb1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="s1" target="l1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb2" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="l1" target="l2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb3" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="l2" target="l3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb4" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="l3" target="l4" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb5" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="l4" target="l5" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb6" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="l5" target="lt" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- CAN bus edges: right leg --> <mxCell id="cb7" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="s2" target="r1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb8" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="r1" target="r2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb9" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="r2" target="r3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb10" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="r3" target="r4" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb11" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="r4" target="r5" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb12" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=none;" parent="1" source="r5" target="rt" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
